title: fagara mantchurica var. grandifolia
intro: Fagara mantchurica var. grandifolia, also known as the Large-leaved Fagara, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it beneficial in treating various health conditions. The Large-leaved Fagara is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and fever. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in infusions, teas, and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
